title: Tags on Files for File Management
excerpt:
Can you add the ability to add tags to files uploaded? This would help with managing files. So if I went into the files section of the search, I could use tags to filter to what I’m looking for. 
It doesn’t seem like any…

posts.author: skyline-megan (Megan Bell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can you add the ability to add tags to files uploaded? This would help with managing files. So if I went into the files section of the search, I could use tags to filter to what I’m looking for.

It doesn’t seem like anyone can change a file name but that could be another option/workaround. And to make the search functionality really helpful, it would be great to add tags to files. At my old job, we used to be able to do that in Basecamp (another project management tool). It would allow us to filter our files by the file tag (for example, “final” version vs. “draft”)

posts.author: Ramses456 (Rami Salle)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would need this feature desperately,
Sincerely, Rami
